title: Horseradish Cream Sauce
ingredients: ½ cup prepared horseradish, drained if needed
Salt and freshly ground black pepper, to taste
instructions: Whip cream in a bowl until soft peaks form.
In a separate bowl, combine mayonnaise, horseradish, and Dijon mustard.
Gently fold in whipped cream using a rubber spatula.
Season with sugar, salt, and pepper.
Stir gently and transfer to a serving bowl.
notes: Excellent with prime rib or corned beef
Standard accompaniment to Christmas Eve Prime Rib Dinner
